newlyPassed: VAL-MU-002 (proximity/leverage indicators — fix-mu-lane-category-filter-and-actions applied, 'technology' now routes to μ lane)
VAL-MU-003 (per-card action suggestions — MuThreadCard now derives 3 action suggestions from thread domain_tags)

frictions.description: Action suggestions are identical across all thread cards ('Monitor AI model releases', 'Review compute resource impact', 'Assess local AI adoption opportunities'). The derivation uses a generic template rather than per-thread domain-specific actions. Technically passes VAL-MU-003 (≥2 action suggestions per card) but could be improved.
